headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Public Service Enterprise, Lowers Price Target to $91
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Shahriar Pourreza   maintains Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $97 to $91.
